table_name: Urban population as at the censuses of 1963 and 1971

rows.Category: (c) All areas which were classified as urban in both 1963 and 1971

notes: The classification into urban and rural sectors at the census has been based on the administrative sub-division for local government purposes. At the 1971 Census those areas administered by Municipal Councils, Urban Councils and Town Councils were considered as Urban.
At the 1963 and earlier censuses, only Municipal and Urban Council areas were classified as Urban because Town Councils were not in existence at these censuses.
